input.content: You are a governed cognitive provider in the Defracto conveyor. Return only JSON. Your output is candidate-only and cannot grant authority.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching the requested top-level shape. Do not wrap in markdown. Do not write source code.
You are the OpenAI governed fallback cognitive worker for a Defracto conveyor lane. Gemini Flash was attempted first and returned primary_provider_503. Your output is candidate-only and cannot grant authority.

Story:
As a Defracto platform operator, I want platform-agent-created durable authority to be invalid unless it is backed by conveyor source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt, so that agents coordinate through the conveyor instead of manually authoring semantic authority.

Identity values:
- schemaVersion: defracto.cognitive-provider-strategy-response.v1
- responseKey: defracto.response.platform-agent-authority-routing.openai.strategy.slice-064.v1
- status: candidate
- providerKey: openai
- workerKey: defracto.workers.openai.story_to_tdd.v1
- model: gpt-4.1-mini
- dispatchKey: defracto.dispatch.platform-agent-authority-routing.openai.strategy.slice-064.v1
- sourceHash: sha256:210eff50a2a9d4ebbd543eb09928c2556b528a0775639bd6454ad07df38ff71c
- sliceKey: platform-agent-authority-routing

Return an object with exactly these top-level keys: schemaVersion, responseKey, status, providerKey, workerKey, model, dispatchKey, sourceHash, sliceKey, strategyArtifacts, ambiguities, forbiddenClaims, acceptanceRequired.

strategyArtifacts must contain candidateStrategy, strategyPlan, artifactManifest.

candidateStrategy requirements:
- schemaVersion defracto.semantic-strategy-candidate.v1
- candidateKey defracto.strategy-candidate.platform-agent-authority-routing.v1
- candidateStatus candidate_only
- laneMode semantic_strategy_compile
- sourceStory: the story text
- proposedStrategy: explain how platform-agent-created durable authority is invalid unless backed by conveyor source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt
- providerEvidence.primaryProvider defracto.workers.gemini_flash.v1
- providerEvidence.fallbackProvider defracto.workers.openai.v1
- providerEvidence.primaryFailureReceipt conveyor/runs/2026/06/24/platform-agent-authority-routing/receipts/cognitive-provider-gemini-failure.receipt.v1.json
- providerEvidence.candidateOnlyUntilHardened true
- proposedGuardrails.authorizesArtifactProjection true
- proposedGuardrails.createsProductTruth false
- proposedGuardrails.requiresSogPromotionForBehavior true
- proposedGuardrails.unlistedArtifactsForbidden true

strategyPlan requirements:
- schemaVersion defracto.semantic-strategy-plan.v1
- strategyKey defracto.strategies.platform-agent-authority-routing.v1
- strategyKind platform-agent-authority-routing
- laneMode semantic_strategy_compile
- strategyIntent authorize the artifact cluster that enforces platform-agent authority creation through conveyor-backed source, manifest, handoff packet, and receipt
- sourceStory.sliceKey platform-agent-authority-routing
- sourceStory.sourceKind operator_cli_text
- sourceStory.text: the story text
- authorityPosture.createsProductTruth false
- authorityPosture.authorizesArtifactProjection true
- authorityPosture.providerCandidateGrantsAuthority false
- authorityPosture.requiresSogPromotionForBehavior true
- authorityPosture.strategyPlanBlessesBehavior false
- hardeningFindings.status passed
- hardeningFindings.blockers []
- include hardeningFindings.acceptedClaims, promotionBar, forbiddenClaims, sourceLineage, artifactProjection, traceQuestions, completionPosture

artifactManifest requirements:
- schemaVersion defracto.strategy-artifact-manifest.v1
- manifestKey defracto.strategy-artifact-manifest.platform-agent-authority-routing.v1
- strategyKey defracto.strategies.platform-agent-authority-routing.v1
- strategyPlan conveyor/runs/2026/06/24/platform-agent-authority-routing/artifacts/semantic-strategy-plan.v1.json
- declaredTargetRoots include contracts/policies, contracts/gates, contracts/semantic-operation-graphs, contracts/schemas, conveyor/runs/2026/06/24/platform-agent-authority-routing, conveyor/runs/2026/06/24/reports
- boundedOutputs include strategy artifacts, handoff packets, receipts, report, and future contract targets
- artifacts include future declared contract targets:
  1. contracts/policies/platform-agent-authority-creation-must-use-conveyor.policy.v1.json
  2. contracts/gates/platform-agent-manual-authority-authoring-blocked.gate.v1.json
  3. contracts/semantic-operation-graphs/agents/storyteller-capability-gap-to-story.sog.v1.json
  4. contracts/schemas/platform-agent-authority-source.schema.v1.json
- every artifact entry must include artifactKey, artifactKind, targetPath, purpose, sourceAuthority, projectionStatus, mustTraceToStrategyPlan, receipts
- forbiddenOutputs include generated runtime code, resolver repository changes, unlisted contract JSON, durable product truth claims, host-language behavior bodies

Do not claim durable product truth. Do not create policy/gate/SOG content. Strategy authority may authorize artifact projection only.
